notableEvents.label: Michael Busch GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch grounds into a double play, second baseman Willi Castro to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Michael Busch out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto grounds out to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw grounds out, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez grounds out, first baseman TJ Rumfield to pitcher Jaden Hill.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Colin Rea picks off Jake McCarthy at 1st on throw to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
